parsed.recommendation_text: For commuting, the JBL Tune 770NC offers a solid balance of features and value. With basic noise cancellation, it provides decent sound isolation for your daily commute at an affordable price point. The 44-hour battery life ensures you won't need to recharge frequently during long commutes. While its build quality is plastic-heavy, the punchy JBL sound signature can be enjoyable on the go. Given your budget constraints and brand familiarity preferences, this model stands out as a practical choice.
parsed.selection_rationale: Affordable price point with decent noise cancellation for commuting.
